message:
fix(robot): include window index in tmux target format

formatTarget previously produced targets like "session:0" which tmux
interprets as "session name : window index 0", causing send-keys and
other pane-targeted commands to hit the wrong pane when the session
has multiple windows.

The corrected format "session:1.pane" explicitly targets window 1
(NTM's default working window) and the specific pane index, ensuring
exit sequences and other robot commands reach the intended pane
regardless of how many windows exist in the session.

Test expectations in pure_test.go updated to match the new format:
  "mysession:0"  -> "mysession:1.0"
  "test:5"       -> "test:1.5"
  "my-ai-session:12" -> "my-ai-session:1.12"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
